[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 01010100 3
2 10001010 3
3 01100000 2
4 00011100 3
5 10001000 2
6 11110100 5
7 00111100 4

01 10 10000000 1
12 21 00110100 3
23 32 00010100 2
34 43 11010100 4
45 54 10101000 3
56 65 00100000 1
67 76 00000100 1
70 07 00001000 1

02 20 00001000 1
13 31 11010100 4
24 42 00111100 4 match 7
35 53 10000000 1
46 64 01100100 3
57 75 00001000 1
60 06 00000000 a
71 17 00010100 2

03 30 10000000 1
14 41 11110100 5 match 6
25 52 00101000 2
36 63 01000100 2
47 74 00011100 3 match 4
50 05 10001000 2 match 5
61 16 01100100 3
72 27 00011100 3 match 4

04 40 10001000 2 match 5
15 51 10100000 2
26 62 00100100 2
37 73 00010100 2
